_comment: Anthropic-shape response identical to s08's; s09 doesn't change the wire format. The wrapper's cycle budgeting + signal handling are orthogonal to provider responses. Verbose mode now prefixes its turn-traces with the spinner ('[busy] Thinking...') and writes RenderThought / RenderResult to stderr — the JSON itself is the same shape Loop.runStep already consumes.

content.text: I'll fetch the URL and then summarize the body.
